name: Baratie
description: Baratie is a famous floating restaurant shaped like a fish, run by ex-pirate 'Red Leg' Zeff. Known throughout the East Blue for its exquisite cuisine and strict policy of feeding anyone who is hungry, even if they can't pay. It's where Sanji worked as sous chef before joining the Straw Hat Pirates, and where Zoro faced the world's greatest swordsman.
history: Zeff established Baratie after retiring from piracy, dedicating it to his dream of an All Blue where all seas' fish could be found. He recruited talented cooks, including young Sanji whom he saved from starvation. The restaurant operated peacefully until Don Krieg's armada, destroyed by Mihawk, sought refuge there. The ensuing battle nearly destroyed Baratie, but the Straw Hats' intervention saved it. After the battle, Sanji left to pursue his dream, with Zeff's blessing.
culture: Baratie's culture is centered around food and combat. All chefs are skilled fighters who can defend the restaurant while cooking exquisite meals. The establishment operates on Zeff's iron rule: never waste food, and feed anyone who's hungry. Pirates and Marines dine side-by-side under an enforced peace. The staff maintains military discipline in the kitchen while providing warm hospitality to guests.
transportation: Baratie is a ship-restaurant that can sail but usually remains anchored in prime fishing waters. Customers arrive by boat, and staff use the ship's own boats for supply runs.

traditions: Feed the hungry regardless of payment

notablePeople.name: Sanji
notablePeople.description: The smooth-talking cook with a chivalrous code and powerful kicks. Dreams of finding the All Blue, a sea where all fish species coexist.

notablePeople.name: Zeff
notablePeople.description: Former pirate known as 'Red Leg' Zeff who saved Sanji and became his mentor. Lost his leg to save Sanji from starvation.

notablePeople.name: Don Krieg
notablePeople.description: The heavily armored 'Pirate Fleet Admiral' of East Blue who attacked Baratie after his fleet was destroyed by Mihawk.

notablePeople.name: Gin
notablePeople.description: Krieg's first mate who Sanji fed when starving. He showed honor by helping Sanji escape despite his loyalty to Krieg.

notablePeople.name: Dracule Mihawk
notablePeople.description: The legendary swordsman who destroyed Krieg's fleet and fought Zoro. Came to Baratie pursuing Krieg for sport.

notablePeople.name: Patty
notablePeople.description: One of Baratie's cooks known for his strict adherence to payment rules, contrasting with Sanji's generosity.

notablePeople.name: Carne
notablePeople.description: Another of Baratie's fighting cooks, loyal to Zeff and protective of the restaurant.

subLocations.name: Main Dining Hall
subLocations.description: The luxurious dining area where customers enjoy Baratie's famous cuisine.
notableFeatures: Where pirates and Marines dine together

subLocations.name: Kitchen
subLocations.description: The heart of Baratie where Zeff, Sanji, and other cooks create culinary masterpieces.

subLocations.name: The Fin (Combat Deck)
subLocations.description: The fish-shaped upper deck that opens like a fin, used for combat and as a last resort dining area.

subLocations.name: Guest Docks
subLocations.description: Small docking area where customer boats anchor while they dine.

items.name: Yoru
items.description: Mihawk's legendary black blade, one of the twelve Supreme Grade swords.

items.name: Wootz Steel Armor
items.description: Don Krieg's near-invincible full-body armor with built-in weapons.

items.name: MH5 Poison Gas
items.description: Krieg's deadly poison gas bomb that nearly killed everyone at Baratie.

items.name: Baratie Itself
items.description: The massive floating restaurant shaped like a fish, Zeff's dream made real.

factions.name: Baratie Staff
factions.description: Fighting cooks who defend the restaurant while maintaining culinary excellence.

factions.name: Krieg Pirates
factions.description: The largest pirate fleet in East Blue, decimated by Mihawk and defeated at Baratie.

events: Zoro challenges Mihawk to a duel
Zoro vs Mihawk - Zoro's first defeat
Krieg arrives demanding food and the ship
Luffy defeats Krieg with Gomu Gomu no Bazooka
Zeff gives Sanji permission to leave
Sanji joins the Straw Hat Pirates

quickFacts: Famous floating restaurant of East Blue
Where Sanji joined the Straw Hat Pirates
Run by ex-pirate Red Leg Zeff
Never wastes food, feeds anyone hungry

videos.title: Zoro vs Mihawk - The Greatest Swordsman
videos.description: Zoro's iconic first defeat against the world's greatest swordsman, and his vow to never lose again.

videos.title: Sanji Joins the Crew
videos.description: The emotional moment when Sanji leaves Baratie to pursue his dream of finding the All Blue.

videos.title: Luffy vs Don Krieg
videos.description: Luffy battles the armored pirate admiral on Baratie's fin deck.
